name: Kick-Butt Super Bowl Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute garlic until soft, 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove the pan from the heat. Stir in the tomato sauce, fennel, oregano, and basil. Spread evenly over the pizza crust, adding more tomato sauce if needed to cover.
4. Break up the sausage into small pieces and add a couple of fennel seeds to each portion.
5. Wipe out the skillet and saute the sausage over medium heat until nearly cooked, 6-8 minutes. Scatter the sausage evenly over the pizza.
6. Sprinkle grated cheeses (melted mozzarella, Gruyère, and Parmesan) evenly over the pizza, including the edges.
7. Bake at 450 degrees for 8 to 12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the crust is browned.
Per serving: 423 calories; 22g protein, 28g carbohydrates, 24g fat (50%); 64mg cholesterol, 945mg sodium
